regional_cost_note: Carpet installation in Palmerston North typically costs $25–$45 per m², depending on carpet type, underlay, and floor preparation required. Restretching and repairs start from around $80–$150 per job.

businesses.name: T & C Drake Limited
businesses.known_for: Domestic and commercial floor cover installation including carpet, vinyl and timber flooring across Rangitikei, Palmerston North, Manawatu, Horowhenua, Whanganui, and Tararua.

businesses.name: Design Flooring Installations Limited
businesses.known_for: High quality carpet, vinyl and substrate preparation work for residential and commercial projects across Rangitikei, Palmerston North, Manawatu, Horowhenua and Whanganui.

businesses.name: Kiwi Flooring Services Ltd
businesses.known_for: Two decades of carpet and vinyl flooring installation for new builds and renovations, including carpet tiles, commercial vinyl, carpet repairs and restretching across Hawke's Bay and Manawatu.
